steps.title: Plug the candidates into the inequality
steps.content: A solution is any $(x,y)$ that makes the given inequality true. Substitute each candidate and check.

steps.title: Test the points
steps.content:
Only $(-3,0)$ satisfies the inequality — substituting $x=-3$, $y=0$ produces a true statement, while the other points produce false statements.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
